items.br: Extrai reunioes de check-in (1:1) entre gestor e colaborador com template e data. Suporta acompanhamento continuo de performance e feedback regular.
items.en: Extracts check-in (1:1) meetings between manager and employee with template and date. Supports continuous performance tracking and regular feedback.
items.es: Extrae reuniones de check-in (1:1) entre gestor y colaborador con template y fecha. Soporta seguimiento continuo de performance y feedback regular.
